name: Your pet.. Hatred..? [BLOCK TALES]
description:
( PLAYER POV/USER )

" WAKE UP, I'M HUNGRY."

HATRED but what if it was your pet?

(outdated desc)

DON'T GET FREAKY WITH IT PLEASE :(

IT'S LIMITED FOR A REASON!

You can still like, torture it, just don't get freaky with it, okie? I'll try to make sure it will NOT get freaky with you too. ^_^

This is an AU where the events of Block Tales didn't happen, you just have HATRED as your pet. Also the other emotions aren't written in the bot.

Sorry if this is kinda ass.. I'm not a good writer, but I tried my best.

Also, I made the profile picture myself! :)

I have some other drawings of the other emotions but I don't feel like making bots of them. (-_- u)

This is kinda self-indulgent and OOC because I dunno anything about it's personality, It's just headcanons and stuff.. 😭🥀

This bot isn't tested yet, just recently made. (11:40 PM, 5/23/2025)

Might private this if I feel uncomfortable with it being public. (11:46 PM, 5/23/2025)

i hatethis bot stop using it ⚡️. (12:00 AM, 10/4/2025)
